name: test-case-analysis
description: A simple TypeScript VS Code extension with a custom sidebar view.

commands.title: Test Case Analysis: Select Test Files
Test Case Analysis: Select Test Folder
Test Case Analysis: Run Tests Efficiently

testCaseAnalysis.testCommandTemplate.description: Command used to run one discovered test case. Use ${file}, ${relativeFile}, ${testName}, or ${testNamePattern} in the command. Note: on Windows, commands that rely on .cmd wrappers (e.g. npx, jest) may need to be specified as npx.cmd.

testCaseAnalysis.tdpWatts.markdownDescription: Override the CPU Thermal Design Power (TDP) in watts used for energy estimation. Leave empty to auto-detect from your CPU model. Example values: laptop U-series = 15, laptop H-series = 45, desktop = 65–125.

testCaseAnalysis.idleBaselinePercent.description: Percentage of TDP to add as a constant idle power baseline. Accounts for power draw even at 0% CPU. Default is 12.5% of TDP.
